seed_expert_discoveries.technical_takeaway: Advanced math-capable model builds full Minecraft clone using Lean theorem prover, highlighting formal verification and creative coding bounds in AI.
Model explains Super Smash Bros. Melee 'wave-dashing' using only words from Mary Shelley's Frankenstein text, showcasing precise lexical constraint handling.
Model explains MIT License in one paragraph using only words from 1920s Al Bowlly songs, demonstrating creative constrained text generation.

global_discoveries.project: Cursor AI Side Chats & Agent Features
global_discoveries.technical_takeaway: Cursor adds side chats with @-mentions for context, agent transcript search, cloud hooks, and redesigned repo pickers for improved AI coding workflows.
Open-source MAREF framework orchestrates AI agents for social media automation, phone tasks, and cross-device workflows targeted at creators.

notes: Limited high-signal posts in 24h window from seeds; focused on notable capability demos and tool updates. Global search yielded mostly noise, with 2 relevant AI tool/framework mentions selected.
